title: UTILITY SUPPORT - 211info
text: CLACKAMAS COUNTY SOCIAL SERVICES UTILITY SUPPORT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides assistance with electricity, natural gas, oil, propane, wood or pellets, and select water/wastewater bills. Funds are limited, and assistance is not guaranteed. May not be eligible for funding if recently received assistance and have not completed the waiting period to be eligible again. 2051 Kaen Road #135 Oregon City, OR 97045 Eligibility: All applicants must have a gross monthly income that is at or below 60% of the Oregon State median income for their household size Heating Assistance: October 1-April 15: Age 60 and older, adults with disabilities, and medically fragile households November 1-April 15: Households with children age 0-6 December 1-April 15: All income-eligible households Cooling Assistance: May 1-September 15: Age 60 and older, adults with disabilities, and medically fragile households June 1-September 15: Open to the general public Water Assistance: Customers of Sunrise Water Authority Hours: Monday-Thursday 7am-6pm (503) 650-5640 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 655-8640 Main phone Main phone (503) 650-5640 Energy Assistance Administration (503) 655-8640 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information and Utility Support Application Request form FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Gross income verification for previous calendar month for all adults age 18 and older in the household, copy of current utility bill (or receipt for wood, propane, oil, or pellets), proof of legal name and current physical address, legal ID for all adults age 18 and older in the household, official documentation to verify SSN (if applicant has SSN) LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, Russian AREA SERVED: Clackamas County SITE HOURS: Monday-Thursday 7am-6pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located at the intersection of Kaen and Beavercreek Roads, at the top of the hill in Oregon City. On TriMet Bus Line 33 with sign: Clackamas Community College/CCC Services: Electric Service Payment Assistance Gas Service Payment Assistance Heating Fuel Payment Assistance Water Service Payment Assistance Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES - ADMINISTRATION COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES - AREA AGENCY ON AGING HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - AGING AND DISABILITY RESOURCE CONNECTION HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - SENIOR HEALTH INSURANCE BENEFITS ASSISTANCE INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - OPTIONS COUNSELING INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - OREGON PROJECT INDEPENDENCE–MEDICAID INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - SENIOR COMPANION PROGRAM INFORMATION SERVICES - FAMILY CAREGIVER SUPPORT PROGRAM AND RELATIVES AS PARENTS REHABILITATION/HABILITATION SERVICES - DEVELOPMENTAL DISABILITIES TRANSPORTATION - TRANSPORTATION REACHING PEOPLE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CLACKAMAS COUNTY SOCIAL SERVICES
